title: George Riding Club hosts WC eventing champs
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Riding Club (GRC),...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Riding Club (GRC), a dedicated non-profit organisation passionate about promoting equestrian sport, is proud to announce that it will be hosting the Western Cape Eventing Championships 2025 from 16 to 18 October.


> This prestigious championship promises an action-packed weekend, showcasing the exhilarating discipline of eventing. Eventing is a triathlon of equestrian sport that includes dressage, showjumping and cross-country.


The event, supported by George Tourism, will bring together top riders and horses from across the country to compete in a true test of skill, precision and partnership.

Spectators are warmly welcomed, so bring your family and friends along for an unforgettable experience celebrating equestrian excellence.

"As we aim to create a remarkable event that highlights the athleticism and passion of both horse and rider, we are reaching out to the community for support.

"Sponsorship opportunities are available from as little as R2 000, with packages tailored to suit your business' marketing goals and budget. We also gratefully accept non-monetary sponsorships in the form of prizes or essential resources," says the club's eventing representative, Gaby Berman.


> For sponsorship enquiries or more information, contact Berman at [email protected].


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
